allow: PowerShell(Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object Used, Free | ForEach-Object { "Used: $\([math]::Round\($_.Used/1GB, 2\)\) GB | Free: $\([math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB, 2\)\) GB" })
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"Y2K streetwear fit for men","history":[]}')

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('STATUS: API working' if d.get\('_raw'\) else 'STATUS: fallback'\); print\('RAW preview:', \(d.get\('_raw',''\)[:200] if d.get\('_raw'\) else d.get\('message',''\)\)\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"show me a college look for men","history":[]}')

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const r=JSON.parse\(j._raw.replace\(/^\\`\\`\\`json\\s*/,''\).replace\(/\\s*\\`\\`\\`$/,''\)\); console.log\('TYPE:', r.type, '\\nMSG:', r.message?.slice\(0,100\)\);")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"message\\":\\"college outfit for men\\",\\"history\\":[]}")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"message\\":\\"show me more looks\\",\\"history\\":[]}")
